prompt: FIXED SUBJECT - LOCKED FOREGROUND LAYER. The attached image shows a woman in a red-and-white vertical pinstripe ruffle-trim cami top and matching ruffle shorts, standing full-length and barefoot, one hand raised behind her head, the other arm holding a stack of folded towels (white, sage-grey, and cream with tassels) against her side, looking up and to her right. Reproduce her and everything she is wearing and holding EXACTLY and identically: same face, hair, skin, expression, pose, hands, body, the exact red pinstripe garment, and the exact folded towels. Do NOT redraw, recolor, restyle, resize, reposition, or alter the woman, her outfit, or the towels in any way. Her pixels are final. Place her on a sunlit Mediterranean poolside terrace: a clean whitewashed plaster wall directly behind her, a glimpse of a turquoise swimming pool with a pale tiled edge to one side, a potted olive tree or trailing bougainvillea, warm terracotta and pale stone tiles underfoot. Replace ONLY the background. Remove the grey armchair and the plain studio backdrop entirely. Her bare feet must sit naturally on the new ground surface with a soft, realistic contact shadow beneath them so she is not floating. Match the light to the subject: soft warm late-morning Mediterranean sunlight from the front-left, consistent with how she is already lit, gentle and natural, not harsh. Photorealistic editorial vacation lifestyle. The outfit reads as the hero of the frame.
